---
title: "pca_inverse_transform"
generated: true
description: "Reconstruct from PCA coordinates: `Z @ components + mean`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.pca`](../nitrix-stats-pca.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:pca_inverse_transform -->
```python
pca_inverse_transform(Z: Float[Array, 'n k'], components: Float[Array, 'k d'], mean: Float[Array, 'd']) -> Float[Array, 'n d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:pca_inverse_transform -->
Reconstruct from PCA coordinates: `Z @ components + mean`.

Maps principal-component coordinates back to feature space, the
exact inverse of `pca_transform` up to the components that were
discarded when the basis was truncated.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:pca_inverse_transform -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `Z` | `Float` | `n` × `k` | — | `(n, k)` principal-component coordinates. |
| `components` | `Float` | `k` × `d` | — | `(k, d)` orthonormal basis, row `i` the `i`-th principal axis. |
| `mean` | `Float` | `d` | — | `(d,)` feature mean added back after reconstruction. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n` × `d`. `(n, d)` reconstruction in the original feature space.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:pca_inverse_transform -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
